'''Kreet'ah''' was a [[Kian'thar]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] during [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor's]] time.<ref name="TCSWE" />

==Biography==
Kreet'ah had been trained from birth for criminal leadership and inherited his position as [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] from [[Shal'mak|his mother]],<ref name="TCSWE" /> just as his [[Kreet'ah's daughter|daughter]] was in line to inherit his position from him.

Before assuming his position as a Vigo, Kreet'ah spent time on his [[Kreet'ah's father|father's]] [[derlac]] farm on his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Shaum Hii/Legends|Shaum Hil]], corralling the [[Cattle/Legends|cattle]] with a [[Derlac whistle|whistle]] as well as selling them for export.<ref name="SotES" />

Kreet'ah used a vast network of spies to infiltrate the megacorporations that worked for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He provided much vital information to [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] about companies such as the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]], [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], and [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]].
